subcodes.first_line: O my God! Thou art He Whose Essence is sanctified above all attributes and descriptions, and before Whom all confess their powerlessness to comprehend Thy reality [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی انت الذی تقدس ذاتک عن کل النعوت و الاوصاف و اقر بالعجز عن ادراک کنهک کل
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @prayer for forgiveness, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @Shrines and Holy places
